tagline: Gentle general dentistry on Cleveland Avenue
seoDescription: Dr. Norman Chau, DDS — friendly, gentle general dentistry at 2921 Cleveland Avenue in Santa Rosa. Medi-Cal accepted; now accepting new patients.
heroHeading: Gentle, pain-free dentistry in Santa Rosa
heroSubheading: Dr. Norman Chau, DDS provides friendly, low-stress general dental care on Cleveland Avenue, with a welcoming team patients trust.
aboutBody: Dr. Norman Chau is a general dentist serving Santa Rosa from his office at 2921 Cleveland Avenue. He treats patients with patience and a gentle touch, focusing on everyday dental care that keeps families healthy.

Patients consistently describe their visits as professional, friendly, and pain-free. The office is known for being clean and comfortable, with a staff that is welcoming and helpful — including with young children and nervous patients.
The practice accepts Medi-Cal and is currently welcoming new patients, making routine dental care accessible to families across Santa Rosa and Sonoma County.

services.title: Exams & Cleanings
services.description: Regular checkups and professional cleanings to keep your smile healthy and catch issues early.

services.title: Fillings & Cavity Care
services.description: Treatment of cavities and repair or replacement of fillings for lasting comfort.

services.title: Crowns & Restorations
services.description: Crowns and restorative work to repair damaged or worn teeth and restore comfortable function.

services.title: General Family Dentistry
services.description: Everyday dental care for patients of all ages, including gentle treatment for children and nervous patients.

testimonials.quote: This was probably the first time in my life I was truly at ease with a dentist. Dr. Chau was professional, friendly, knowledgeable, patient, and best of all pain-free.
testimonials.author: Cynthia C.
